name: Pasta e Fagioli Alla Veneziana
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Italian canned peeled tomatoes, broken by hand
3 1/2 oz Cotechino Italian sausage or 1 piece of pancetta
1 medium potato, small cubes, partially cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dry beans in cold running water for 12 hours or more, depending on the quality of the beans.
2. Drain and cook the beans with the cotechino or pancetta in plenty of fresh, cold, salted water over medium heat for 2 hours until soft.
3. Heat oil in a large saucepan and sauté onion and garlic over medium heat until transparent.
4. Add celery and carrots, cooking until the carrots are soft.
5. Add beans with their juice, discarding cotechino or pancetta; add wine, tomatoes, basil, potato cubes, oregano, salt, and pepper.
6. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
7. Add partially cooked pasta and continue simmering over low heat until the pasta is al dente. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Serve cheese in a separate bowl so each person can garnish their soup to taste.
